advertising_expense_actuals.significance: RFC consistently spends at or slightly above the amount collected in ad fees, demonstrating full deployment of the marketing fund.

vie_election.standard: ASU No. 2018-17, Consolidation — Targeted Improvements to Related Party Guidance for Variable Interest Entities (VIE)
vie_election.election: RFC elected not to apply VIE guidance to legal entities under common control
vie_election.condition: Both RFC and the evaluated entity are not public business entities
vie_election.effect: Hester family affiliate entities (Pizza Rococo Inc., TRH Restaurants Inc./II/III, Airport Pizza Roc Inc., Rocky Rococo Corporation) are NOT consolidated into RFC's financial statements despite common ownership and control
vie_election.significance: The financial statements reflect only the franchisor entity. The 7 affiliate-owned restaurants' operating results, assets, and liabilities are not included. This understates the total economic footprint of the Rocky Rococo system under Hester family control.

receivables.measurement: Net amount expected to be collected through allowance for credit losses
receivables.credit_risk_mitigation: Credit checks and actively pursuing past due accounts
receivables.payment_terms: Due by end of following week to which activity relates

cash_equivalents.definition: Highly liquid investments with original maturities of 3 months or less
cash_equivalents.fdic_risk: Cash may exceed FDIC insurance limit at times; no losses expected

other_receivables.description: Gift cards sold online and at restaurants; funds processed through third-party processor

revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Single performance obligation; recognized when location is opened or transferred
revenue_recognition.royalty_recognition: Recognized as income in the same period in which sales occur
revenue_recognition.royalty_reduction_accounting: If threshold not met, Company retroactively reduces to 3.5% and credits difference to franchisees' balance owed in the future
revenue_recognition.advertising_fee_recognition: Recognized as income in same period; excess over expenses recorded as cooperative advertising fund surplus

related_party_entities.standard_applied: ASU 2018-17 (VIE alternative for non-public entities under common control)

deferred_tax_net.note: 2022 deferred tax assets/liabilities column garbled in OCR; net appears to be $0 or immaterial

note4_income_tax_detail.uncertain_tax_positions: None required to be recorded for all 3 years

statute_limitations.federal: No longer subject to examination for years before 2021
statute_limitations.state: No longer subject to examination for years before 2020

balance_sheet_null_repairs.source: Balance sheet p.60, cross-referenced with user-provided clean text
